confirmed.note: NtxIndex::descend_leftmost_ and descend_rightmost_ are near-identical B-tree walks; only slot 0 vs kc and key_index 0 vs kc-1 differ. Classic mirror copypaste in a freshly added file.
CdxIndex::next() and prev() are mirror copies: +1/-1 step, read_u32_le offset 8 (right) vs 4 (left), AfterEnd vs BeforeBegin, first vs last decoded entry. Same 25-line skeleton copied and edited.

false_positives.what_happened: Each PHP arg spec is a ZEND_BEGIN_ARG_WITH_RETURN_TYPE_INFO_EX(...) / ZEND_ARG_TYPE_INFO(...) / ZEND_END_ARG_INFO() block. Dozens of these differ only in the arginfo name and IS_STRING/IS_LONG type tokens, so the token pass sees many near-verbatim 3-6 line windows. This is generated-style declaration boilerplate (a macro-driven ABI signature table), not logic copypaste.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: add a macro-declaration-table filter — when a candidate window is dominated (>70% of non-trivial tokens) by ALL-CAPS macro invocations whose bodies carry no control flow (no if/for/while/return, no operators beyond ',' and '('), drop it. Generalizes the existing protobuf/moc generated-header marker to hand-written but table-shaped macro blocks like ZEND_*, X_MACRO, gperf tables.

false_positives.what_happened: System-table definitions are built from inline std::vector<Col> initializer lists ({"COL_NAME",'C',200,0}, ...). Multiple such Col-table literals across the file share the {name,type,len,dec} shape and the surrounding build(cols, rows) idiom, so the detector matches the brace-init rows as duplicated chunks even though they encode distinct schemas.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: when a window is mostly brace-enclosed aggregate initializers (high ratio of string/char/number literals + braces, near-zero identifiers-as-callees and no statements ending in ';' other than the initializer), treat it as a data table and exclude. Same heuristic also kills the round1 ace_exports literal-table hits, raising precision without hiding the genuine wrapper-logic copies.

cycle.desc: no include cycle: archcheck --graph reports sccs_cyclic=0, largest_scc=1 over 260 nodes / 438 edges
cycle.evidence: Authored tree under src/ (openads:: namespace, no vendored engine). Graph is acyclic; nothing to attribute.
